positive: Minimalist geometric illustration of a celestial fox spirit (kitsune) surrounded by bioluminescent mushrooms and glowing fractal foliage. The fox should have a clean, stylized silhouette, rendered with deep sapphire blues, vibrant cyan highlights, and glowing emerald green accents. Use a high-contrast, flat vector art style with detailed line work, mimicking modern Japanese woodblock print aesthetics. Centered composition, suitable for a round apparel print. Soft ambient volumetric lighting, octane render, extremely detailed.
